query:
SELECT edp.userId,
       DATE_FORMAT(edp.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS business_date,
       ROUND(edp.totalPoints * 100, 2) AS display_points,
       edp.rawAchievementRate,
       edp.kpiAchievementRate
FROM engineer_daily_productivity edp
WHERE edp.userId = 750212
  AND edp.businessDate >= '2026-05-01'
ORDER BY edp.businessDate DESC;

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(psd.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS business_date,
       psd.stationCode,
       COUNT(*) AS detail_count,
       ROUND(SUM(psd.earnedPoints) * 100, 2) AS display_points
FROM productivity_score_details psd
WHERE psd.userId = 750212
  AND psd.businessDate >= '2026-05-01'
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(psd.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d'), psd.stationCode
ORDER BY business_date DESC, psd.stationCode;

       ROUND(edp.totalPoints * 100, 2) AS display_points,
       edp.rawAchievementRate,
       edp.kpiAchievementRate
FROM engineer_daily_productivity edp
WHERE edp.userId = 750212
  AND edp.businessDate >= '2026-05-01'
ORDER BY edp.businessDate DESC;

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(psd.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS business_date,
       psd.stationCode,
       COUNT(*) AS detail_count,
       ROUND(SUM(psd.earnedPoints) * 100, 2) AS display_points
FROM productivity_score_details psd
WHERE psd.userId = 750212
  AND psd.businessDate >= '2026-05-01'
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(psd.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d'), psd.stationCode
ORDER BY business_date DESC, psd.stationCode;
